full_text:
Zhang Qi 張岐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Qi (張岐). Sent by Han Fu and Yuan Shao to get Liu Yu to take up the throne. Zhang Qi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
